name: defillama-reader
description: Read DeFi protocol data from DefiLlama — TVL, yields, chains, and protocol metadata. No API key required.

tools.name: get_protocol_tvl
tools.description: Get TVL and metadata for a specific DeFi protocol

tools.name: get_chain_tvl
tools.description: Get TVL data for blockchain chains

tools.name: get_defi_yields
tools.description: Get yield/APY data across DeFi protocols and pools
